Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

ENME424 Urban Microclimate and Energy (3 Credits) Urban microclimate from the perspective of transient heat and mass transfer using building energy simulations for building clusters as well as LEED building certiﬁcation criteria. The focus is on understanding building energy consumption and environmental impacts from the individual building scale to a neighborhood scale. Prerequisite: ENES232; and must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in ENME332 . Jointly offered with: ENME742. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Mechanical Engineering department. Credit Only Granted for: ENME424 or ENME742.
